mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.contract_no, t.contract_name, t.contract_type, t.contract_direction, t.customer_id, t.customer_name, t.supplier_id, t.supplier_name, t.contract_amount, COALESCE(pp.paid_amount, 0) AS paid_amount, COALESCE(pp.total_plan_count, 0) AS total_plan_count, COALESCE(pp.paid_plan_count, 0) AS paid_plan_count, t.start_date, t.end_date, t.sign_date, t.status, t.payment_terms, t.payment_schedule, t.contract_file_url, t.dept_id, t.manager_id, t.renew_from_id, t.renew_count, origin.contract_no as renew_from_no, t.created_by, t.created_time, t.updated_by, t.updated_time, t.deleted FROM contract_main t LEFT JOIN contract_main origin ON t.renew_from_id = origin.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT contract_id, SUM(CASE WHEN actual_amount IS NOT NULL AND status = 20 THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) AS paid_amount, COUNT(1) AS total_plan_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_plan_count FROM contract_payment_plan GROUP BY contract_id ) pp ON pp.contract_id = t.id
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, contract_direction, customer_id, customer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, sign_date, status, payment_terms, payment_schedule, contract_file_url, dept_id, manager_id, renew_from_id, renew_count, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM contract_main WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, contract_direction, customer_id, customer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, sign_date, status, payment_terms, payment_schedule, contract_file_url, dept_id, manager_id, renew_from_id, renew_count, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM contract_main WHERE contract_no = #{contractNo} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_main ( contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, contract_direction, customer_id, customer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, sign_date, status, payment_terms, payment_schedule, contract_file_url, dept_id, manager_id, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{contractNo}, #{contractName}, #{contractType}, #{contractDirection}, #{customerId}, #{customerName}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{contractAmount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{signDate}, #{status}, #{paymentTerms}, #{paymentSchedule}, #{contractFileUrl}, #{deptId}, #{managerId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE contract_main
contract_no = #{contractNo}, contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_type = #{contractType}, contract_direction = #{contractDirection}, customer_id = #{customerId}, customer_name = #{customerName}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, sign_date = #{signDate}, status = #{status}, payment_terms = #{paymentTerms}, payment_schedule = #{paymentSchedule}, contract_file_url = #{contractFileUrl}, dept_id = #{deptId}, manager_id = #{managerId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE contract_main SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE contract_main SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, contract_direction, customer_id, customer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, sign_date, status, payment_terms, payment_schedule, contract_file_url, dept_id, manager_id, renew_from_id, renew_count, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM contract_main WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY end_date ASC

SELECT id, contract_no, contract_name, contract_type, contract_direction, customer_id, customer_name, supplier_id, supplier_name, contract_amount, start_date, end_date, sign_date, status, payment_terms, payment_schedule, contract_file_url, dept_id, manager_id, renew_from_id, renew_count, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted FROM contract_main WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} AND dept_id = #{deptId} AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY end_date ASC
